games.name: AstroMenace
games.description: AstroMenace is a hardcore 3D space scroll-shooter with spaceship upgrade possibilities. High-quality graphics and intense gameplay.

games.name: Celeste Classic
games.description: Celeste is a hardcore platformer about climbing a mountain. Players guide a character named Madeline up a 3000-meter mountain, using precise jumping, wall-jumping, and a single air-dash.

games.name: DDNet
games.description: DDraceNetwork is a Teeworlds modification with unique cooperative gameplay. Help each other through custom maps with up to 64 players. This package includes both the game client and the server.

games.name: Descent 1
games.description: Descent 1 is a groundbreaking 3D first-person shooter. Players act as a mercenary navigating maze-like mines across the solar system, destroying infected robots, destroying the reactor, and escaping.

games.name: Descent 2
games.description: Descent 2 is a horror-thriller sequel to Descent 1. Following traumatized survivor Sarah as she is forced to return to the cave system by authorities to find her missing friends.

games.name: Marathon 2
games.description: Is the critically acclaimed sequel to Bungie’s sci-fi masterpiece. As a cybernetic Security Officer, you are abducted by the rogue AI Durandal to the distant planet Lh'owon.

games.name: Pac-Man
games.description: High-performance Pac-Man clone optimized for SDL. This is a clone of the original Pac-Man game.
